name: Michael Palin: Travels of a Lifetime
original_name: Michael Palin: Travels of a Lifetime
overview: Michael Palin revisits his first four TV travel documentaries. He draws on his personal archive of audio recordings and diary notebooks, and reflects on how he became a seasoned global traveller. Featuring contributions from fans and friends, including David Attenborough, Joanna Lumley and Simon Reeve.

trailers.title: Michael Palin: Travels of a Lifetime - Own it on Digital Download & DVD.
